name: Pistachios

pros.title: fat and texture help satiety
pros.explanation: They can hold up better than many snack foods.

pros.title: texture helps them feel satisfying
pros.explanation: That can make moderation easier than with softer snack foods.

pros.title: portable, practical snack food
pros.explanation: Nuts score real points in life because they are easy to use.

cons.title: protein is useful but not elite
cons.explanation: Nuts help, but they are not protein stars.

cons.title: portion control can get slippery fast
cons.explanation: Dense foods punish casual handful math.

cons.title: calorie density is very high
cons.explanation: That makes portion control a real issue.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate representative placeholders for ruleset tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
